# Regenerating the DoB golden fixture

The golden test in `server/tests/golden_dob_capture.rs` compares the emitted
DoB byte stream against `expected.bin` (checked in).  Regenerate after any
intentional encoding change.

## Steps

1. Delete the existing golden:

   ```bash
   rm server/tests/fixtures/dob_golden/expected.bin
   ```

2. Run the test once to seed the file:

   ```bash
   cd app/publisher
   cargo test --test golden_dob_capture 2>&1 | tail -5
   ```

   The test writes `server/tests/fixtures/dob_golden/expected.bin` and passes.

3. Inspect the generated bytes:

   ```bash
   xxd server/tests/fixtures/dob_golden/expected.bin
   ```

   Expected: 196 bytes — 24-byte frame header followed by 172 bytes of messages
   (BB open 16 + OrderAdd 52 + OrderCancel 32 + OrderExecute 56 + BB close 16).
   Bytes 12–19 within the frame header are zeroed (masked send_timestamp_ns).

4. Commit the refreshed file:

   ```bash
   git add server/tests/fixtures/dob_golden/expected.bin
   git commit -m "tests: refresh DoB golden fixture"
   ```

## Diff on mismatch

When the test fails it writes `actual.bin` next to `expected.bin`:

```bash
xxd expected.bin > /tmp/exp.txt
xxd actual.bin   > /tmp/act.txt
diff /tmp/exp.txt /tmp/act.txt
```
